name: sigvelo-nanites
description: A canonical skill for setting up Sigvelo, creating Nanites, writing generated triggers, and testing them through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Create and test durable GitHub Nanites through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Teaches agents how to set up Sigvelo, author thin Nanite manifests, write generated trigger handlers, use the Sigvelo MCP acceptance loop, and keep Nanite operating knowledge in one focused skill with references.
defaultPrompt: Create a Nanite for this repo
